Shift #2: The 'Query Phantom' technique.

When someone asks AI 'what's the best smartphone?' — AI doesn't just answer.

It fans that query out into dozens of subqueries:
→ iPhone vs Samsung
→ Best camera phone 2025
→ Best Android under ₹30k
Then it stitches the answers.

@DS2LightingMod If it misses query or cache cell's sample counts are low = update it by tracing deeper this pixel. I'm not super awesome (yet) at parallelizing compute shader work but I think it's possible. 

I find the 2-pass NRC/SHARC scheme to be quite clumsy and even hamfisted!

@LayAngels @CrewkerneMan No. Rupert Lowe, independent MP for Great Yarmouth and founder of Restore Britain, has faced accusations over a 2025 leaked remark calling a small camera a "Jewish camera" (which he called a joke) and replying "ban it" to a query on public-sector kosher meat from an extreme account. He denies antisemitism, calling such claims smears from political rivals after his Reform UK split. 

No evidence supports him being fascist; critics apply the label to his nationalist, mass-deportation stance, but it doesn't match historical fascism. These are standard partisan attacks on right-wing populists.
